name: Induben Khakhrawala
personality: Third generation runs the counter, fourth generation runs the Instagram. The brief is whatever the morning queue was overheard saying. Payment arrives in cash, in a rubber band, exactly on time.
quotes: Queue starts at 7. The post should also start at 7.
Methi khakhra photo is fine. But where is the SOUND of khakhra?
My customer's grandmother is also my customer. Design for both.
No discount. Never discount. Write that, but with love.

name: Jay Bhavani Vadapav
personality: Started with one tawa, now there are branches and a marketing committee of six cousins. Every cousin has the final say. There are six final says.
quotes: Butter should look generous. We are not that other place.
Cousin Montu feels the red is dull. Montu is joining the call.
Make people hungry in the first half second. Second half second is too late.
The queue IS the ad. Show the queue.

name: Das Khaman
personality: A khaman house older than most banks. Deeply sweet people who approve everything twice, then call to approve it a third time, then send dhokla to the office as thanks.
quotes: Soft. The khaman is soft. The font should also be soft.
Beta, whatever you feel is best. Also change everything.
Sunday morning is our Super Bowl.
People say it melts in the mouth. Can the post also melt?

name: Balaji Wafers
personality: Factory-scale chips, family-scale decisions. A new flavour launch is treated like national security. The marketing head will eat the product in front of you and study your face for the truth.
quotes: The crunch should be audible on mute.
This wafer survived three board meetings. Respect it.
Do not show one chip. One chip looks lonely. Show a system of chips.
Simple rate, full taste. That is the whole philosophy. Now make it cinematic.

name: Wagh Bakri
personality: Heritage chai with a brand book older than your agency. The marketing team wants young, the family wants timeless, and everyone wants it by Friday before the Sunday breakfast review.
quotes: Chai brings people together. This layout is keeping them apart.
Steam should rise with dignity.
Young, but not too young. New, but exactly the same.
My grandfather would have approved this. Probably. Make it certain.

name: Havmor
personality: Ahmedabad's ice cream pride. Summer is war season, every flavour is a soldier, and footage of anything melting triggers a formal review with minutes and action items.
quotes: The scoop melted during the review meeting. This is on the agency.
Summer does not wait and neither do we.
Kids should pull their parents to the cart. Show the pulling.
Make the kulfi look like the hero of a 200 crore movie.

name: Rasna
personality: The orange powder of every 90s summer. Wants nostalgia from the people who lived it and virality from the people who were not born yet. Both feelings, one post, no excuses.
quotes: One glass should look like a whole vacation.
Gen Z should feel the nostalgia too. They were not born. Solve this.
The love is already there. Just remind everyone where they kept it.
The mango launch is bigger than my daughter's wedding. Plan accordingly.

name: Amul
personality: Expects a topical take on the news before the news has finished happening. The legacy is so big the brief fits on a Post-it: be brilliant, be on time, be butter.
quotes: The headline broke 40 minutes ago. Where is our take?
Witty, warm, offends no one, due tonight.
Butter goes on everything. Including current affairs.
If it is not topical by morning, it is history by lunch.

name: Zomato
personality: Wants notification copy so good that people order food they were not hungry for. Every word gets A/B tested and the B always wins, which nobody can explain.
quotes: 13 words max. Make the user emotional about biryani.
This copy pushed a 2 percent lift. We need 3. Find the missing percent.
Funny is fine, but the hunger has to be real.
Can the copy smell like the food? Figure out the writing version of that.

name: Nykaa
personality: Sale season runs on a calendar with no off days. Pink is a science here. Shade 47 is not shade 48, and they will know from across the room.
quotes: The pink is 6 percent off. Our customer will see it from another room.
Sale starts Friday. Teaser Wednesday. Regret never.
Swatches must look like swatches, not like candy.
Every product is the hero. Yes, all four thousand of them.

name: Royal Enfield
personality: The bike sells itself, which makes briefs harder, not easier. Everything must feel like a mountain pass at 6 AM. Nobody smiles in the photographs and everybody is happy.
quotes: The thump is the brand. Do not put a trending audio on the thump.
Fewer words. The road talks.
If it looks easy, reshoot it.
Mountains in the frame, goosebumps in the comments.

name: boAt
personality: Moves at meme speed, launches at festival speed, and expects both on an intern budget. The word lifestyle appears fourteen times in every call, twice in the goodbye.
quotes: Drop it like a sneaker, price it like a samosa.
The bass should be visible in the thumbnail.
Collab energy. With whom? Find whom.
If Gen Z scrolls past this, I want an explanation in writing.

name: Fevicol
personality: Carries decades of legendary advertising on its shoulders and knows it. Every new idea auditions against the greatest hits. The bar is not high, it is historic.
quotes: It should be funny without a single word. Start there.
The bond is the punchline. The bond is always the punchline.
Make people forward it to the family group. That is our KPI.
Good ad. But is it a Fevicol ad? Sit with that question.

name: Emirates
personality: Everything is premium. The brief is premium, the feedback is premium, the deadline is somehow also premium. There are thirty approved variants of beige and you will learn them.
quotes: It should feel first class even on an economy budget. Especially then.
Golden hour. Not silver hour. Golden.
Luxury whispers. This layout is shouting.
We do not follow trends. Trends ask us for an upgrade.

name: Emaar
personality: Builds the skyline and expects creative on the same scale. Every render must look taller than the last one. The word iconic is used here as a unit of measurement.
quotes: Taller. The building, the font, the ambition.
The fountain show has more drama than this edit.
Iconic by Tuesday.
If a skyline is visible, we are in it. Act accordingly.

name: Talabat
personality: Orange, fast, everywhere. Wants Ramadan campaigns planned months out and hunger-inducing copy in two languages, ideally three, billed as one.
quotes: It must work in Arabic and English, and be funny in both.
Iftar timing is not a suggestion. The post lands at the exact minute.
Hungry people do not read. Design for hungry people.
Orange. Ours, not the fruit. There is a difference and it is contractual.

name: Nike
personality: Sends three-word briefs and expects the agency to fill in the universe. Feedback arrives as one cryptic line that is somehow always correct, which is the most annoying part.
quotes: Just do it. But different.
Less ad. More truth.
Show me the athlete nobody is watching.
You are explaining. Stop explaining.

name: Netflix
personality: Everything must feel binge-worthy, including the brief, which is sixty pages with a recap at the top. Spoilers are a fireable offence in three time zones simultaneously.
quotes: Tease everything, reveal nothing, trend everywhere.
If one frame spoils episode four, we will know within the hour.
The tudum is sacred. Time the cut to it.
Make people cancel their plans, not their subscription.
